narrative:
Auburn Twp (precinct in Crawford County) has 462 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
